items.title: Connect your post
items.desc: Paste the link of your giveaway post or Reel. To copy it: open the (•••) menu on the post and tap “Copy link”.

items.title: Comments or likes
items.desc: Choose the entry source: draw from people who commented or from people who liked the post.

items.title: Choose the reveal animation
items.desc: Decide how the winner is revealed — an opening vault or a countdown (more scenes coming). Turn on live streaming to show the draw to your audience in real time.

items.title: Unlock and draw
items.desc: Make the one-time payment and the draw runs instantly: participants shuffle on screen and the winner appears at the climax, with an auditable result.

items.title: Share the results
items.desc: Download the video cuts ready for Stories, Reels and feed, and publish the results page with a verifiable certificate.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: The most common questions about Instagram giveaways.

items.a: Giveaways are one of the fastest ways to grow: they boost comments, reach and followers in days, strengthen your bond with your audience, and give your brand a reason to celebrate that people love to share.

items.q: Why does collecting every comment matter?
items.a: If a tool reads only part of the comments, the draw is unfair — several people never even enter. We pull the complete list, even with thousands of entrants, so everyone has exactly the same chance.

items.q: How does the AI giveaway work?
items.a: The AI reads your post and identifies the rules automatically (mentions, hashtags, keywords) and even helps validate winning profiles. You save time and avoid setup mistakes.

items.q: Is the AzuraSort draw safe and trustworthy?
items.a: Yes. Each draw uses an auditable random algorithm with a signed seed that produces a publicly verifiable certificate. Anyone can confirm the result wasn't manipulated.

items.q: Can I draw from Reels and carousels?
items.a: Yes. It works with posts, Reels and carousels — just paste the link of the giveaway post.

items.q: Can I run a free giveaway?
items.a: You can. At /gratis you paste the entrants by hand (one @ per line) and draw instantly, free and with no signup — with the same verifiable certificate. What you pay for is the heavy lifting: pulling the post's comments automatically and generating the reveal video.

items.q: How much does a professional giveaway cost?
items.a: You pay per draw, with no subscription: from R$19.90 (local currency applies), depending on the number of winners and the plan. You see the exact amount before paying, by card or PIX. There is no monthly fee and no recurring charge.

items.q: How many winners can I choose?
items.a: As many as you want. You can also set backups to replace anyone who breaks the rules or doesn't claim the prize, plus enable required mentions, remove duplicates and limit entries per person.

items.q: How do I ensure the giveaway is fair and transparent?
items.a: We collect every comment, draw with a reproducible random algorithm and generate a certificate with a verification code. You share the results page and your followers confirm everything.

items.q: Does it work with private accounts?
items.a: To guarantee a fully official giveaway within Instagram's rules, we work with securely connected business or creator accounts. Private accounts don't expose comments publicly.

items.q: Can I restart the same giveaway?
items.a: Yes, as many times as you want, using the same post — handy for testing the animation before the final live draw.

items.q: What makes AzuraSort different from other tools?
items.a: Besides drawing fairly, we turn the winner announcement into a cinematic reveal and automatically generate a video ready for Stories, Reels and feed. The result becomes content your audience shares.

errors.noComments: We couldn't read this post's comments. It may be an 18+, private, or comment-less post. Try another link.
errors.exportUnsupported: Your browser can't generate the video here. Use an updated Chrome or Safari (ideally on mobile).
errors.videoWebm:
Your browser will generate the video in WebM, which Instagram does NOT accept. For an Instagram-ready MP4, open in an updated Chrome or Safari (ideally on mobile).

Download as WebM anyway?
errors.videoFail: Couldn't generate the video. Please try again.

pix.title: Pay with PIX
pix.scan: Scan the QR code in your bank app
pix.autoConfirm: Confirmation is automatic as soon as the PIX clears.

verify.okDesc: The result matches the seed and the participant list.
verify.failDesc: This result could not be confirmed by the public algorithm.
verify.how: How to verify: sort the participant @handles alphabetically, shuffle with Fisher-Yates using the revealed seed (SHA-256), and confirm the winners match. The hash was generated before the reveal.

ready.title: Payment confirmed!
ready.subtitle: All set. Run the draw whenever you’re ready.
ready.hint: The reveal starts as soon as you click.
ready.pasteTitle: We couldn't read this post's comments
ready.pasteDesc: Instagram limits automatic reading on some posts (common with Reels). No problem: paste the comments below and we'll run your draw as normal — with the video and certificate you already paid for.
ready.pasteHelp: Open the post on Instagram, select the comments area, copy (Ctrl+C) and paste above.
ready.pasteEmpty: Paste at least a few comments to run the draw.
ready.pasteSupportMsg: Hi! I couldn't read the comments for my giveaway and need help. Post:
